title: oldenlandia chrysotricha
intro: Oldenlandia chrysotricha, also known as yellow hairy milkwort, is a herbaceous plant belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, headache, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Oldenlandia chrysotricha include reducing fever, alleviating headaches and body aches, and relieving respiratory problems such as cough and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
